title: Harder
body:
# Harder
Makes Minecraft a harder game.

### Features
- removed saturation
- removed villages
- nerfed crafting planks -> 1 log to 1 plank
- tools require ingot blocks
- removed enchanting tables
- no beds
- food drops are nerfed
- food crafts are complicated
- crafting tables require sticks and flint to craft
- respawn with 12 health
- fish don't drop fish
- fishing rods don't exist
- totems don't work
- no f3 screen
- zombies do much more damage
- ender dragon has more health
